_comment: SkillOpt build benchmark. Each task is built with the candidate skill, then scored (renders cleanly? required elements/text present? finished?). train = optimize on; val = the held-out gate.

train.prompt: Build a centered 'Hello, World' landing page with a gradient background, a big heading, and a single call-to-action button. Single index.html. Then call done.
Build a counter app: a large number starting at 0, with a + button and a - button that increase and decrease it. Make it work with vanilla JavaScript. Single index.html. Then call done.
Build a simple to-do list: a text input, an 'Add' button, and a list below. Typing and pressing Add appends the item to the list (vanilla JavaScript). Single index.html. Then call done.
Build a Pomodoro focus timer showing 25:00, with Start and Reset buttons that run a working countdown in vanilla JavaScript. Single index.html. Then call done.
Build a 3-tier pricing section: three cards (Basic, Pro, Team) each with a price, a few features, and a 'Choose' button. Single index.html. Then call done.

val.prompt: Build a simple calculator: a display and number/operator buttons that compute results in vanilla JavaScript. Single index.html. Then call done.
Build a live digital clock, centered, that updates every second with vanilla JavaScript and shows the current time. Single index.html. Then call done.
Build a profile card: a circular avatar, a name, a short bio line, and a 'Follow' button. Single index.html. Then call done.
